a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Annual CO₂ emissions from deforestation for food production
Tonnes of CO₂ emissions linked to deforestation for food production – it is trade-adjusted, to reflect the carbon
footprint of diets within a given country. Based on the annual average over the period from 2010 to 2014.
Note: Trade adjustment means that deforestation linked to the production of imported food products is added to a country's total; exported
emissions are subtracted from its total.
